card_text:
Qwen3 14B - Dense Transformer with QK-Norm. Parameter count: 14B. Max context: 128K tokens. Trained on 36T tokens across 119 languages. Apache 2.0 license.

Benchmarks:
- MMLU: 81.05% (5-shot)
- MMLU-Pro: 61.03% (5-shot, CoT)
- GSM8K: 92.49% (4-shot, CoT)
- MATH: 62.02% (4-shot, CoT)
- HumanEval (EvalPlus): 72.23% (0-shot)
- MBPP: 73.40% (3-shot)
- BBH: 81.07% (3-shot, CoT)

Capabilities: Text generation, reasoning, coding, multilingual (119 languages), tool use (MCP protocol), thinking/non-thinking modes, agentic capabilities.
